title: Apple's AI Chief John Giannandrea Departs This Week
description: John Giannandrea, Apple's former head of artificial intelligence, is set to leave the company this week as his final stock vesting date approaches. In his "Power On" newsletter, Mark Gurman noted that Giannandrea's exit has been a prolonged one. Apple moved to dramatically reduce his role in March 2025 following the disappointing launch of Apple Intelligence and ongoing delays to the Siri overhaul, stripping him of oversight of Siri, robotics, and other AI teams at that time.
content:
John Giannandrea, Apple's former head of artificial intelligence, is set to leave the company this week as his final stock vesting date approaches.

title: Sakeena Itoo Reviews Proposed AI Initiatives Of IIT Jammu For Reforms In School Education, Health Sectors
description: JAMMU, Apr 13: Minister for Health and Medical Education, Social Welfare and Education, Sakeena Itoo, today chaired a high-level meeting to review the proposed Artificial Intelligence (AI) initiatives presented by IIT Jammu aimed at bringing transformational reforms in the School Education and Health sectors across Jammu and Kashmir. The meeting was attended by Commissioner Secretary, Health and Medical Education, M. Raju; CEO, State Health Agency, Anant Dwivedi; Directors of School Education Jammu/Kashmir and other senior officers of the Health and […]

title: IIT-Kharagpur Launches Cutting-edge AI Certification Programmes
description: The Indian Institute of Technology-Kharagpur has introduced online executive certification programs in artificial intelligence, aimed at equipping working professionals with practical skills. These programs, conducted by the Department of Computer Science and Engineering, include Generative AI and AI-Native Software Engineering, delivered through live online classes.
content:
The Indian Institute of Technology-Kharagpur has launched a groundbreaking series of online executive certification programmes in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and technology leadership.

title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman addresses Molotov cocktail attack on his home and AI backlash
description: Hours after a Molotov cocktail was thrown at his San Francisco home, OpenAI Chief Executive Sam Altman addressed the criticism surrounding artificial intelligence that appears to have been the impetus for the attack.
content:

title: AI without safeguards can amplify weaknesses in finance sector: RBI DG
description: Adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) without safeguards can amplify existing weaknesses and create new problems in the financial sector, Reserve Bank Deputy Governor Swaminathan J has said.

title: How AI could help doctors find lung cancer earlier - and save more lives
description: Artificial intelligence is showing promise as a tool for detecting lung cancer nodules that even trained radiologists can miss, according to researchers in Cleveland.
content:
CLEVELAND, Ohio (InvestigateTV) — Artificial intelligence is showing promise as a tool for detecting lung cancer nodules that even trained radiologists can miss, according to researchers studying the technology at University Hospitals in Cleveland.
